name: Consomme
steps: Add all ingredients in stockpot, bring to the boil then simmer gently for one hour.
Pass the stock, keep the mushrooms.
Reduce the stock further if necessary and season.
Dry the leftover mushrooms to be freeze-dried and turned into powder.
Mix the ingredients then store for service.
Boil water and pour over the tea. Allow to steep for 3 minutes then pass.
Place the hay in a tea jug, heat the consomme and pour in. Allow to infuse 5 minutes.
In a ceramic cup, place red currants and 3 drops of smoke oil.
